description: Removes an active G4 session from the sessions registry, releasing its resources.

sessionId.description: The unique identifier of the G4 session to remove.

name: g4.RemoveSession

removed.description: Indicates whether the session was successfully removed. False if the session identifier was missing or no session existed for the identifier.

sessionId.description: The session identifier that was targeted for removal.

title: Remove G4 Session
